name: Indonesian Pork Skewers
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons ginger preserves or orange marmalade
1 1/2 pounds lean boneless pork, cut into 1-inch cubes
1/2 medium pineapple, halved lengthwise and cored, cut into 1/2-inch slices
1 medium red sweet pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, combine the vinegar, mustard, molasses, ginger preserves (or orange marmalade), and ground ginger.
2. Alternately thread the pork cubes, pineapple slices, and pepper strips onto twelve 6-inch metal skewers, leaving about 1/4 inch between each piece.
3. Brush the skewers with the molasses mixture.
4. Grill the kabobs on the rack of an uncovered grill directly over medium-hot coals for about 12 minutes, or until no pink remains and juices run clear. Turn and brush with the molasses mixture after 6 minutes.
5. Heat any remaining molasses mixture and pass it over the kabobs.
6. Makes 6 servings.
